admin_media_edit_fit_hint: How the video sizes inside its container.
admin_media_empty_hint: Drop files anywhere, click Upload, or Add Link to get started.
admin_settings_test_email_failure_defaul: Check your SMTP settings and save them first.
admin_settings_maintenance_warning: ⚠ Site is in maintenance mode — non-admin visitors are redirected to the maintenance page.
admin_settings_favicon_subtitle: Pick an image from the Media library. Empty uses the bundled default icon.
admin_media_picker_empty: No media files yet. Upload one from the Media page first.
admin_settings_storefront_lang_subtitle: Default language used by the public storefront when a visitor has not chosen one yet.
admin_settings_homepage_subtitle: Choose what visitors see at the storefront root (/). Pick a published Page to replace the default Home template.
admin_settings_site_notice_subtitle: Text displayed in the announcement strip above the storefront header. Leave empty to hide the strip.
admin_settings_hidden_products_subtitle: Products in the selected categories are excluded from the public shop list, search results, and category navigation. Direct /products/<slug> URLs still resolve so the products remain purchasable via private links or future special UI.
admin_settings_shipping_subtitle: Countries available at checkout (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes).
admin_settings_payment_subtitle: Configure Stripe credentials and the runtime mode used for new orders.
admin_settings_payment_mode_live_hint: Live — real charges will be made.
admin_settings_payment_country_hint: Country your Stripe account is registered in. Drives the default country shown in the payment address fields.
admin_settings_payment_webhook_hint_mid: in Stripe Dashboard, then paste the
admin_settings_payment_save_cards_hint: Allow logged-in customers to save cards for future purchases.
admin_settings_shipany_subtitle_pre: Live shipping rates at checkout, label printing, pickup booking and tracking via
admin_settings_shipany_api_key_hint: From portal.shipany.io → Settings. Env-prefixed keys (SHIPANYDEV / SHIPANYSBX1 / SHIPANYDEMO) are auto-routed to the right subdomain.
admin_settings_shipany_webhook_hint_pre: ShipAny mostly delivers tracking via polling. If your account supports push callbacks, register
admin_settings_shipany_webhook_hint_post: and paste the HMAC secret here.
admin_settings_shipany_pickup_subtitle: Sender address used for rate quoting and waybill generation. Falls back to merchant info from the portal when blank.
admin_settings_shipany_courier_load_fail: Couldn't load courier list — check credentials and Refresh.
admin_settings_shipany_paid_by_receiver_: Bill the recipient instead of the merchant.
admin_settings_shipany_self_drop_off_hin: Drop parcels at the courier counter instead of door pickup.
admin_settings_shipany_show_courier_trac: Surface the courier-side tracking number to customers.
admin_settings_email_subtitle: Used to send order confirmation emails. Gmail: enable 2FA → create an App Password at myaccount.google.com/apppasswords.
admin_settings_email_enabled_hint: Master switch for outgoing email. When off, transactional and notification emails are skipped (the Test Email button still works so you can validate SMTP).
admin_settings_email_smtp_password_hint: Use a Google App Password — not your account password.
admin_settings_email_public_base_url_hin: Used to build links inside transactional emails.
admin_settings_email_admin_alert_hint: Receives low-stock and other admin alerts. Falls back to the From address when empty.
admin_settings_low_stock_subtitle: Email the admin alert recipient when a variant crosses its low-stock threshold.
admin_settings_low_stock_alerts_hint: Disable to silence all low-stock notifications.
admin_settings_low_stock_default_hint: Used when a variant has no per-variant override.
admin_settings_tax_subtitle: Apply a single global tax rate at checkout. Disabled by default.
admin_settings_tax_rate_hint: Percentage applied to the discounted subtotal.
admin_settings_tax_inclusive_hint: When ON, displayed prices include tax (back-calculated). When OFF, tax is added on top.
admin_settings_loyalty_subtitle: Reward customers with points earned on purchases.
admin_settings_abandoned_subtitle: Email logged-in customers when their cart has been idle past the threshold. Trigger from your own cron via POST /api/v1/admin/abandoned-cart/run.
admin_settings_abandoned_threshold_hint: How long a cart must be idle before a reminder is sent. One reminder per cart.
admin_settings_test_email_modal_subtitle: Sends a test email using your current saved SMTP settings.
admin_settings_recaptcha_subtitle_pre: Spam protection for contact forms. Get keys at
admin_settings_recaptcha_min_score_hint: Submissions scoring below this are rejected. 0.5 is a sensible starting point.
admin_settings_desc_free_shipping_thresh: Order subtotal (HKD) at or above which shipping is free. 0 = disabled.
admin_settings_desc_ga4_measurement_id: Google Analytics 4 measurement ID (e.g. G-XXXXXXXXXX). Empty disables GA4.
admin_settings_desc_loyalty_enabled: Master switch for the loyalty program (P3 #24).
admin_settings_desc_loyalty_points_per_h: Points earned per HK$1 of paid order subtotal (post-discount).
admin_settings_desc_loyalty_redeem_rate_: Points needed to redeem HK$1. Reserved for future checkout integration.
admin_settings_desc_meta_pixel_id: Meta (Facebook) Pixel ID. Empty disables Meta Pixel.
admin_settings_desc_cache_ttl_shop: Product & category cache TTL in seconds (default: 300)
admin_settings_desc_cache_ttl_cms: CMS pages & posts cache TTL in seconds (default: 300)
admin_settings_desc_cloudflare_zone_id: Cloudflare Zone ID used to purge cached uploads on delete
admin_settings_desc_cloudflare_api_token: Cloudflare API Token used to purge cached uploads on delete
admin_settings_desc_upload_max_image_mb: Maximum image upload size in megabytes
admin_settings_desc_upload_max_video_mb: Maximum video upload size in megabytes
admin_settings_desc_maintenance_mode: When true, non-admin visitors are redirected to the maintenance page
admin_settings_desc_mcp_enabled: Allow AI agents to connect to this store via MCP
admin_import_orders_intro: Pulls every WooCommerce order (status pending / on-hold / processing / completed / cancelled / failed / refunded), keyed by WC order ID. Re-runs are idempotent — already-imported orders are updated in place; line items are wiped and re-inserted. Inventory is never decremented (orders are historical). Local order numbers are freshly generated; the WC order ID is preserved alongside.
admin_import_orders_confirm_full: All WooCommerce orders will be imported into Gyeon. Existing rows (matched by WC order ID) are updated in place; line items are wiped and re-inserted from the WC payload. Inventory is left untouched.
admin_import_orders_confirm_limited: Up to {limit} WooCommerce order(s) will be imported into Gyeon. Existing rows are updated in place; inventory is left untouched.
admin_import_customers_intro: Pulls every WooCommerce customer (and admin-role users) into Gyeon, keyed by WC customer ID. Email-only fallback adopts manually-created storefront accounts. Re-running is safe — already-imported rows are updated in place. Passwords are never migrated; customers must use the storefront password-reset flow.
admin_import_customers_confirm_full: All WooCommerce customers will be imported into Gyeon. Existing rows (matched by WC ID or email) are updated in place; addresses on already-imported customers are left untouched.
admin_import_customers_confirm_limited: Up to {limit} WooCommerce customer(s) will be imported into Gyeon. Existing rows are updated in place; addresses on already-imported customers are left untouched.
admin_import_customers_setup_email_intro: Choose who receives the setup-password email after import. Requires SMTP configured and the email master switch on.
admin_import_customers_setup_email_skip_: Just import the data — no email is sent. Customers imported under this mode become eligible the next time you run "Email customers without password".
admin_import_customers_setup_email_passw: Send the setup-password email only to imported customers who haven't set a password yet AND haven't already received the email. Idempotent — re-running won't re-spam.
admin_import_customers_setup_email_force: Send the setup-password email to every imported customer, ignoring password and prior-email state. For re-onboarding campaigns or post-incident resets.
admin_import_subtitle: Import items from a WooCommerce store via REST API.
admin_import_test_failed_missing_creds: Please fill in the URL, Consumer Key and Consumer Secret first.
admin_import_test_failed_check_keys: Please check the URL and API keys.
admin_import_test_failed_timeout: Connection timed out or network error.
admin_import_no_creds_body: Please configure WooCommerce credentials in Import Settings first.
admin_import_confirm_upsert_full: WooCommerce data will be used to update existing products and add any missing ones. Products deleted on the WC side will be removed from Gyeon as well; admin-created products, translations, and images are not affected. Continue?
admin_import_confirm_upsert_limited: WooCommerce data will be used to update existing products and add any missing ones. Only the first {limit} products will be processed; products deleted on the WC side will not be cleaned up. Admin-created products, translations, and images are not affected. Continue?
admin_import_confirm_replace_full: All previously imported WooCommerce products (including translations, variants, and images) will be deleted, then re-imported from WooCommerce. Admin-created products are kept. This action cannot be undone — continue?
admin_import_confirm_replace_limited: All previously imported WooCommerce products (including translations, variants, and images) will be deleted, then the first {limit} products will be re-imported from WooCommerce. Admin-created products are kept. This action cannot be undone — continue?
admin_import_run_failed_default: Could not connect to WooCommerce — check the URL and API keys.
admin_import_run_timeout: Connection timed out — check that the WooCommerce URL is correct.
admin_import_stream_failed_default: Import failed. Please try again later.
admin_import_stream_dropped: The import connection dropped — check the server logs and re-run.
admin_import_run_error: An error occurred during the import. Please try again later.
admin_import_product_type_hint: Choose what to import. Run "Products" first so any bundle components exist before running "Bundle Products".
admin_import_product_type_bundle_warning: ⚠ Bundle components are matched by WooCommerce product ID — components missing in Gyeon will be skipped. Run "Products" first if needed.
admin_import_limit_hint: Empty / 0 = import everything; N = import only the first N products (with their variants). Useful for testing.
admin_import_limit_warning: ⚠ When a limit is set, products deleted on the WC side will not be cleaned up (to avoid removing entries the limited scan didn't see).
admin_import_mode_upsert_desc: Use WooCommerce as the source of truth for stock, price, weight, etc.; preserves admin translations, manually uploaded images, and admin-created products. Products deleted on the WC side are removed from Gyeon as well.
admin_import_mode_replace_title: Re-import (delete old WC products, then reload)
admin_import_mode_replace_desc: First delete all previously WC-imported products (including their translations and images), then re-import a fresh copy. Admin-created products are kept.
admin_import_run_hint: The system tests the connection first and only starts the import once the test passes.
admin_discounts_subtitle: Manage automatic campaigns and customer-entered coupon codes.
admin_redirects_subtitle: Send traffic from old URLs to new ones with 301 or 302 redirects.
admin_redirects_help_from: Must start with /. Exact match — query strings are ignored.
admin_audit_log_subtitle: Every high-sensitivity admin action with the actor and a JSON snapshot of what changed.
admin_audit_log_empty: No audit entries yet — perform an admin action to see one here.
admin_stock_history_subtitle: Every stock-in / stock-out event across all variants, with the actor and source.
admin_stock_history_empty: No stock movements match your filters.
admin_product_stock_history_subtitle: Every stock change across all variants of this product.
admin_email_templates_subtitle: Override the wording for transactional emails. Reset any time to fall back to the built-in default.
admin_email_templates_variables_hint: Insert any variable below using Go template syntax — wrap it in double curly braces.
admin_forms_delete_body: This will permanently delete the form and all its submissions. This cannot be undone.
admin_forms_markup_hint: Insert a tag above, or write CF7 syntax manually.
admin_forms_reply_field_hint: Name of the email field that carries the submitter's address.
